faqs.question: How much does long-term care insurance cost in Charleston?
faqs.answer: Annual premiums in Charleston vary by age and coverage. A typical policy for a 55-year-old costs around $2464 per year.

faqs.question: Does Medicaid cover long-term care in Charleston?
faqs.answer: Medicaid may cover nursing home care if you meet income and asset limits. There is a 5-year lookback period for asset transfers.
